name: tg-cli
description: Telegram in your terminal — local-first sync, search, export, and analytics via MTProto and SQLite.

commands.name: recent
commands.description: View recent messages within a time window

commands.name: today
commands.description: View today's messages with optional sync

commands.name: send
commands.description: Send a message to a chat

use_cases: Search and retrieve Telegram conversations by keyword
Analyze messaging patterns and top senders
Export chat history for archival or analysis
